Module com.example.progettosw
Package Network.Client

Class ClientController

java.lang.Object
Network.Client.ClientController
public class ClientController extends Object
This class is the controller of the client

    this method is used to Send to server which card the player has choosen to draw
    void
    startGameLoop()
    This method is used to start the game loop
    void
    tryToReconnect()
    Method used after the server goes down It tries to reconnect to the server If there is not a sever available it waits for the user to press enter
    void
    updateModel(Message message)
    This method is used to update the model of a client
